parts.text:
```plantuml
@startuml
header CVX-AI - Vue & Flask framework interaction
title VideoPlayer.vue (FileManager Component)

actor User
participant Website
participant "Web Server" as WebServer
participant "Filesystem Server" as FilesystemServer
database "PC Filesystem" as PCFilesystem

User -> Website : opens
activate Website

Website -> WebServer : initialize
activate WebServer
note right of Website: http://localhost:8080/

Website -> FilesystemServer : initialize
activate FilesystemServer
note right of Website: http://localhost:8090/

FilesystemServer -> PCFilesystem : read
activate PCFilesystem

PCFilesystem --> FilesystemServer : return\ndefault\ndirectory
note right of WebServer: .../CVX_AI_WebUI/root/api/data/"

FilesystemServer --> Website : provide\ndirectories

Website --> User : display\nSyncfusion\nFileManager\ncomponent

deactivate Website
deactivate WebServer
deactivate FilesystemServer
deactivate PCFilesystem

@enduml
```
